actor_feat.description: Physical attacks seed enemies with a stacking Grey Goo payload. The payload is not armor-piercing; it is patient.
actor_feat.strategy_tip_optional: Applies Grey Goo to enemies hit by physical attacks, even when armor blocks the immediate damage. Rapid Fire applies additional stacks, so the per-hit payload is intentionally restrained.

actor_feat.description: Hits corrode the target's armor plating, blind it briefly, and leave it burning.
actor_feat.strategy_tip_optional: The armor corrosion and burn last a few turns; the blindness is short but sharp. The lance's Terrify payload does the rest.

actor_feat.description: Hits disrupt the target's weapons (percentage attack power loss) and corrode its armor plating.
actor_feat.strategy_tip_optional: Deliberately strong: this is the Insight doctrine's nonviolent answer to being shot at.

actor_feat.description: Hits apply Grey Goo stacks, and deal bonus physical damage scaling with the Grey Goo already on the target.
actor_feat.strategy_tip_optional: Bonus damage is +6% per existing Grey Goo stack, up to +150%. Saturate a target, then finish it.

actor_feat.description: At the start of each turn, this unit regenerates a percentage of its maximum health equal to the feat rating.
Regrows 1 ablative charge per turn, holding up to 3. While a charge is held, an incoming hit's physical damage is capped to the feat rating and the charge is consumed.
Whenever an enemy hits this unit, that enemy gains Grey Goo stacks equal to the feat rating.
At the start of each turn, rebuilds up to the feat rating of missing energy shield, consuming Elemental Slurry (1 per 10 shield rebuilt).
While at least one of your fielded units carries this, enemies your forces kill are rendered into Medical-Grade Nanobots, scaled by the number of harvesters fielded (capped per turn).
At the start of each turn, every hostile unit within the feat rating's radius gains 1 Grey Goo stack.
At the start of each turn, converts one hostile unit within the feat rating's radius to your forces. Works on organic and unhackable units; captured-unit capacity is raised automatically as needed.
At the start of each turn, heals every friendly unit within this unit's current attack range for a percentage of its maximum health equal to the feat rating.
At the start of each turn, applies the Reweave mark to friendly units within the feat rating's radius, priming their nanobot colonies.
